nasb.text: Unleavened bread shall be eaten throughout the seven days; and nothing leavened shall be seen among you, nor shall any leaven be seen among you in all your borders.

esv.text: Unleavened bread shall be eaten for seven days; no leavened bread shall be seen with you, and no leaven shall be seen with you in all your territory.

cnv.text: 七日之中你要吃無酵餅；在你四境之內，不可見有發過酵之物在你面前，也不可見有酵在你那裡。

ccb.text: 七天之内要吃无酵饼，你们境内不得有酵或是带酵的东西。
